# rubrik_identity_provider (Data Source)

The `rubrik_identity_provider` data source is used to access information about
an identity provider configured in RSC. An identity provider is looked up using
either the `identity_provider_id` or the `name`.

-> **Note:** If multiple identity providers share the same name, look up by name
   will fail. Use the `identity_provider_id` attribute to specify the exact
   identity provider.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `identity_provider_id` (String) Identity provider ID (UUID).
- `name` (String) Identity provider name.

### Read-Only

- `active_users` (Number) Number of active users for this identity provider.
- `authorized_groups` (Number) Number of authorized groups for this identity provider.
- `claim_attributes` (Attributes Set) IDP claim attribute mappings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--claim_attributes))
- `default` (Boolean) True if this is the default identity provider.
- `entity_id` (String) SAML entity ID.
- `expiration` (String) Certificate expiration date.
- `id` (String) Identity provider ID (UUID).
- `metadata_json` (String) SAML metadata as JSON.
- `sign_in_url` (String) SAML sign-in URL.
- `sign_out_url` (String) SAML sign-out URL.
- `signing_certificate` (String, Sensitive) SAML signing certificate.
- `sp_initiated_sign_in_url` (String) Service provider initiated sign-in URL.
- `sp_initiated_test_url` (String) Service provider initiated test URL.

<a id="nestedatt--claim_attributes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `claim_attributes`

Read-Only:

- `attribute_type` (String) Claim attribute type.
- `name` (String) Claim attribute name.
